case_title: SAAD ALSORIHI VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALSORIHI, SAAD AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALSORIHI, SAAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,524.10 PRINCIPAL, $4.65 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,753.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
